comments:
Extended Path Builders — Additional primitives for icon construction.

This module extends Icon.Path with more complex shape builders needed
for a complete icon library: hearts, stars, polygons, gears, etc.

declarations.comments:
Create a regular polygon path.

Parameters: center X, center Y, radius, number of sides, rotation (degrees).
declarations.title: regularPolygonPath

declarations.comments:
Create a star path.

Parameters: center X, center Y, outer radius, inner radius, number of points.
declarations.title: starPath

declarations.comments:
Create a heart path.

Uses bezier curves for smooth heart shape.
declarations.title: heartPath

declarations.comments:
Create a gear/cog path.

Parameters: center X, center Y, outer radius, inner radius, teeth count.
declarations.title: gearPath

declarations.comments: Create a sun path (circle with rays).
declarations.title: sunPath

declarations.comments: Create a plus in circle icon.
declarations.title: plusCirclePath

declarations.comments: Create a minus in circle icon.
declarations.title: minusCirclePath

declarations.comments: Create a check in circle icon.
declarations.title: checkCirclePath

declarations.comments: Create an X in circle icon.
declarations.title: xCirclePath

declarations.comments: Create a question mark in circle icon.
declarations.title: helpCirclePath

name: Hydrogen.Icon.Path.More
